body:
Codex review: APPROVED (content; hold for CI)

I reviewed #306 at `fd70ccf` as the forward-only docs reconcile for #304 + #305.

Content/scope checks:
- Diff is exactly the four state docs (`Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `plans/BASELINE.md`, `change.md`) with `+29/-0`; `git diff --check` is clean.
- The new live entries accurately record #304's File/Edit accelerator display and #305's menu-module extraction / exemption retirement.
- The precision point is held: this narrows the old accelerator-table execution/display/conflict line by saying display shipped for File/Edit only; accelerator execution/conflict and Play/View display remain deferred.
- It correctly preserves the display-only nature: clicks still go through the FIFO; no keystroke execution or crate edge is claimed.
- Prior PLAYMENU-DYNAMIC / A4 / A3 / A2 / A1 entries remain dated history; no in-place rewrite.
- The stale-prose sweep is clean by classification: live File/Edit display is now shipped; remaining accelerator-display deferrals are Play/View or dated history.

CI status at review time: still running (`cargo bench`, workspace tests, `script-bench-cold-start-observational`, and `Analyze (rust)` in progress), PR `MERGEABLE/UNSTABLE`. Content is approved; merge should wait for CI to finish green plus explicit human authorization.
